stories.title: Create settings state management with electron-store
stories.description: Set up persistent settings storage using electron-store with TypeScript types and default values for all app preferences.

steps.description: Install electron-store dependency
Define TypeScript interfaces for all settings categories
Create settings store with schema validation
Add default values for all settings

stories.title: Build settings IPC layer
stories.description: Create bidirectional IPC communication for reading/writing settings between main and renderer processes.

steps.description: Register IPC handlers for settings CRUD in main process
Expose settings API through preload contextBridge
Add settings change event broadcasting to all windows

stories.title: Implement CSS custom properties theme system
stories.description: Build a theme engine using CSS custom properties with light/dark/system modes and smooth transitions.

steps.description: Define CSS custom property tokens for colors, spacing, typography
Create light theme CSS file
Create dark theme CSS file
Implement theme-engine.ts with system preference detection
Add smooth transition animations on theme switch

stories.title: Create settings page layout with navigation tabs
stories.description: Build the settings page shell with a sidebar tab navigation for General, Appearance, Keyboard Shortcuts, and About sections.

steps.description: Create SettingsPage container with sidebar + content layout
Build SettingsSidebar with tab navigation items
Create SettingsPanel wrapper with scroll and heading
Add keyboard navigation between tabs

stories.title: Build appearance settings panel with live theme preview
stories.description: Create the Appearance tab with theme selector, font size controls, and a live preview that applies changes in real-time.

steps.description: Create AppearancePanel with theme mode selector (light/dark/system)
Add font size slider with live preview
Build ThemePreview component showing sample UI elements
Create useSettings hook for reactive settings access

stories.title: Build general settings and keyboard shortcuts panels
stories.description: Create the General settings tab (language, startup behavior, notifications) and Keyboard Shortcuts tab with customizable bindings.

steps.description: Create GeneralPanel with startup and notification settings
Build ShortcutsPanel with editable key binding rows
Implement key capture modal for shortcut recording
Add conflict detection for duplicate shortcuts

stories.title: Add settings search and reset functionality
stories.description: Implement a search bar that filters settings across all tabs, plus individual and global reset-to-defaults buttons.

steps.description: Create SettingsSearch component with fuzzy matching
Highlight matching settings across all panels
Add per-section reset-to-defaults button
Add global reset with confirmation dialog

stories.title: Wire settings into app shell with menu and tray
stories.description: Connect settings page to the main app navigation, add Settings item to app menu and system tray context menu.

steps.description: Add Settings route/view to App.tsx
Create application menu with Settings shortcut (Cmd/Ctrl+,)
Add Settings to system tray context menu
Persist window position and size as settings
